subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Bernard, spoken on 1913-03-18
subcodes.first_line: You have travelled through India... When the Persian government imprisoned Baha'u'llah in Teheran... Detachment does not imply lack of means; it is marked by the freedom of the heart. In Tihran, we possessed everything… There were once two friends, one rich but free of heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: ولی انقطاع بعدم اسباب نیست بلکه بعدم تعلق قلب است ما در طهران شب دارای هر چیز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @excellence; distinction, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism
